projects.title: NEVARIA
projects.headline: Turning furniture into an atmosphere.
projects.description: A cinematic digital flagship for a Saint Petersburg furniture studio — pairing editorial restraint with an interactive spatial experience.
projects.challenge: NEVARIA creates considered interiors, but its digital presence did not fully communicate the emotional and material quality of the work.
projects.idea: We treated the website as a room rather than a catalogue. Editorial pacing, architectural typography and an interactive interior let visitors feel the brand before reading about it.
projects.outcome: A high-fidelity independent concept that demonstrates how digital atmosphere can strengthen premium positioning and make a furniture business memorable.
projects.coverAlt: Warm, material-rich residential interior for the NEVARIA concept

gallery.alt: NEVARIA interior with timber joinery and courtyard light

gallery.caption: Full-bleed editorial imagery gives every project room to establish atmosphere.

gallery.alt: NEVARIA interior with timber joinery and courtyard light
gallery.title: Editorial pacing

gallery.alt: NEVARIA interior with timber joinery and courtyard light

projects.title: BANKIFY
projects.headline: Making complex finance feel effortless.
projects.description: A modern banking platform built around clarity, confidence and rapid everyday actions across accounts, transactions and transfers.
projects.challenge: Financial interfaces carry dense information and high-stakes actions. The experience needed to feel calm without hiding capability.
projects.idea: A modular product system prioritises balance, movement and transaction clarity. Complex flows become small, decisive interactions.
projects.outcome: A scalable application architecture covering linked accounts, transfers, transaction history and a responsive authenticated experience.
projects.coverAlt: BANKIFY account dashboard with balances, transactions and analytics

gallery.title: Account overview
gallery.caption: Balances, cards, transactions and useful insights share one calm information hierarchy.

gallery.alt: BANKIFY send money and confirmation flow
gallery.title: Transfer intelligence
gallery.caption: Recipient selection, fees, authentication and success remain visible across one decisive flow.

projects.title: MARKETPLACE
projects.headline: A marketplace designed for momentum.
projects.description: A complete listings experience with authentication, advert creation and editing, translated into a coherent scalable interface system.
projects.challenge: Marketplaces must support rapid discovery while handling complex creation, authentication and management flows.
projects.idea: The system uses energetic product imagery, strict information hierarchy and reusable interaction patterns to keep both buyers and sellers moving.
projects.outcome: A technically complete marketplace study with authentication, advanced advert creation, editing and a scalable component architecture.
projects.coverAlt: Marketplace discovery interface with local product listings

gallery.alt: Marketplace search, categories and listing discovery
gallery.title: Discovery engine
gallery.caption: Search, filters and varied inventory are organised for fast local discovery.

gallery.alt: Marketplace seller workspace and listing manager
gallery.title: Seller workspace
gallery.caption: Listings, performance, messages and publishing tools form one coherent workspace.

services.title: Positioning & strategy
services.body: Clarifying what makes the business valuable, who the website must persuade and the strongest story to tell.

services.title: Digital art direction
services.body: Distinct visual worlds, typography, interface systems and motion languages built around the brand — never a recycled template.

services.title: Design & development
services.body: Responsive, accessible, high-performance websites built as one coherent product from first sketch to production.

services.title: Interactive experiences
services.body: Spatial interfaces, WebGL, 3D concepts and meaningful interactions for brands that need an unforgettable digital presence.

principles: Strategy, design and development remain under one founder-led creative direction.
Working prototypes and visible progress replace vague presentations and agency theatre.
Every visual decision must support positioning, comprehension, trust or conversion.
Documentation, analytics and considered post-launch support are part of the work.
